b@Warning.outputValue: This isolated bond is probably not intended to have chemical significance.
observedValues: This isolated bond is probably not intended to have chemical significance.

bracketedgroup@ComponentOrder.rule: The SDK defines the bracket field but labels the BracketedGroup object as written-only; current ChemDraw also removes an incomplete synthetic form.

bracketedgroup@PolymerRepeatPattern.rule: The SDK defines the bracket field but labels the BracketedGroup object as written-only; current ChemDraw also removes an incomplete synthetic form.

observedValues: Chemical symbol is not associated with an atom.

group@Integral.rule: Integral means the group is non-subdivisible when nonzero. ChemDraw flattens a synthetic one-child group on save, so the property disappears with its container.

marker@CaptionJustification.rule: The current official DTD defines this specialized object's parent/content model, lexical type, enumeration, and default. ChemDraw removes a context-free synthetic instance rather than retaining a partial object.

step@ReactionStepPlusses.rule: ReactionStepPlusses is an object-ID list of plus graphics in a reaction step. ChemDraw removes a step that has no valid reactant/product context, including this reference.

templategrid@extent.rule: TemplateGrid is valid only for template documents; all four fields are required and page count must equal rows times columns. A normal-document save removes the grid.

templategrid@NumColumns.rule: TemplateGrid is valid only for template documents; all four fields are required and page count must equal rows times columns. A normal-document save removes the grid.

templategrid@NumRows.rule: TemplateGrid is valid only for template documents; all four fields are required and page count must equal rows times columns. A normal-document save removes the grid.

templategrid@PaneHeight.rule: TemplateGrid is valid only for template documents; all four fields are required and page count must equal rows times columns. A normal-document save removes the grid.
